title: Billing
loadError: Could not load billing details. Try again in a moment.

access.title: Access
access.purchaseStackRemaining: About {{duration}} from your stacked one-time purchases.

animatedPfp.title: Animated profile pictures
animatedPfp.body: Set an animated GIF as your profile picture.

customBanners.title: Custom banners
customBanners.body: Set your own profile banner images, including animated ones.

supporterIcon.title: Supporter icon
supporterIcon.body: Pick a supporter icon that appears next to your name.

levelPacks.title: More packs & items
levelPacks.body: Get <packStat><packMult>×5</packMult><packRange>(20 ➔ 100)</packRange></packStat> more packs, and keep <itemStat><itemMult>×10</itemMult><itemRange>(250 ➔ 2500)</itemRange></itemStat> more items in each.

benefits.comingIntro: We're still building out TUFStellar. Here's what we're working toward (timing may change):

gradients.title: Custom gradients
gradients.body: Choose CSS-style gradients for more control over how your profile looks.

bios.title: Richer bios
bios.body: Support for a simple formatting language (Markdown) so you can structure your bio beyond plain text.

layout.title: Profile layout
layout.body: Reorder profile sections (for example, put rank history above difficulty stats) so what you care about shows up first.

benefits.ideasBody: TUFStellar is new, and we'd love your input. If you have a feature that would make your profile or the site more fun to use, <discordLink>tell us in Discord</discordLink> — we read suggestions.

checkout.giftNonRefundable: Gifts are not refundable. Choose the recipient carefully.
checkout.projectedAccessUntil: Buying this will extend your TUFStellar until {{date}}.

actions.noneNeeded: Purchases are not available for this account.

history.title: Activity
history.refundPolicy180: Stripe only allows refunds within {{days}} days of the original charge. This safeguard is enforced automatically.
history.refundFullBody: You will receive about {{refund}} back. Your access from this purchase will end after the refund is processed (usually within a few minutes).
history.refundPartialBody: Time already used is priced at {{listRate}} per month (about {{listCharge}} retained). You will receive about {{refund}} back. Access from this purchase ends after the refund completes.
history.refundSuccess: Refund submitted. Activity will update shortly.

refundReason.NOT_FOUND: That billing record was not found.
refundReason.NOT_STRIPE_CHECKOUT: Only Stripe checkouts can be refunded here.
refundReason.WRONG_STATUS: This row is not in a refundable state.
refundReason.NOT_PURCHASER: Only the purchaser can refund this payment.
refundReason.NO_PAYMENT_INTENT: No payment is linked to this event.
refundReason.NO_SEGMENT: No entitlement is linked to this purchase anymore.
refundReason.SEGMENT_EXPIRED: This access period has already ended.
refundReason.TOO_OLD: This charge is past the refund window.
refundReason.ALREADY_REFUNDED: This charge has already been refunded.
refundReason.ZERO_REFUND: There is nothing to refund under the current policy.

refundErrors.REFUND_TOO_OLD: This charge is past the refund window.
refundErrors.REFUND_ALREADY_REFUNDED: This purchase has already been refunded.
refundErrors.STRIPE_ERROR: Stripe could not complete the refund. Try again or contact support.

pages.tufStellarSubtitle: Buy stacked access time or gift it to another player.

toasts.checkoutOpened: Complete payment in the new tab.
toasts.checkoutError: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
toasts.checkoutInvalidTerm: Invalid term. Refresh and try again.
toasts.checkoutInvalidCurrency: Invalid currency. Refresh and try again.
toasts.giftRecipientBlocked: That account can't receive this right now.
toasts.giftEmailRequired: Recipient needs an email on file (or yours for self-checkout).

callback.title: Finalizing your purchase
callback.waiting: Confirming your payment with our system…
callback.statusNotDone: Payment was not completed. You can try again from the billing page.
callback.sessionForbidden: This payment link does not match your account.
callback.sessionNotFound: We could not find that checkout session.
callback.fulfillmentFailed: Payment was recorded but we could not finish applying access. Contact support with your checkout session id.
